subject: VPN connection fails after password reset
description: User recently changed their Active Directory password and is now unable to connect to the corporate VPN. Authentication fails with an invalid credentials message.
reason: VPN connection failed due to authentication issue after password reset.

subject: Production VM unavailable
description: Critical production virtual machine is not responding after scheduled maintenance. Business applications hosted on the VM are inaccessible.
reason: Critical virtual machine availability issue impacting business application hosting.

subject: Emails not reaching external recipients
description: Users can send emails internally but messages sent to external domains are not being delivered.
reason: Email functionality is affected because external email delivery is failing.

subject: Unable to access internal websites
reason: User cannot access internal websites, suggesting a server-level issue.

subject: Shared storage nearing capacity
description: File storage volume has reached 95 percent utilization and users are unable to upload new documents.
reason: Storage capacity is nearing critical levels, preventing file uploads.

subject: Suspicious phishing email reported
description: Employee received an email requesting confidential company information. The sender appears to be impersonating a senior executive.
reason: Suspicious email reported, potentially containing confidential company information

reason: VPN connectivity issue is preventing access to company resources.
